notes: Compressed long-session proxy for Gemini CLI: 4 plain-prompt turns in ONE interactive session (turn 3 also runs a yolo-approved run_shell_command `echo gamma` to satisfy the scenario's 'at least one tool call'). Spec asserts the per-turn ready→working→ready arc with NO flicker WITHIN a turn and no stuck state across the session; final state ready. WHY no within-turn flicker (parser.go + tailer.go): the opening user text → user_message+ClearToolNames (ready→working, 155-157); the tool result is a user-role functionResponse routed to function_call_output WITHOUT ClearToolNames so it never settles (133-140); a failing tool's error/cancelled status sets IsError only, which the classifier ignores (tailer.go:991-992); a tool-calling gemini message stays assistant_message NOT turn_done (209-211). State settles to ready only on each turn's final text-only message (non-empty content, zero toolCalls → turn_done), and reopens on the next user prompt. The driver runs `gemini -y` so the tool-calling turn never trips a permission gate → never waiting. The intermediate_working phase pins the within-turn no-flicker invariant on turn 3 (the tool-calling turn, the one most likely to flicker) with duration_at_least_ms 2000. PROVISIONAL on emission: a doc/code read proves the parser won't flicker on a tool result or a tool-calling chunk, but cannot prove Gemini never writes an intermediate text-only message MID-turn (which would settle early then reopen) — only the live recording promotes this from provisional to settled. observations assert the widened verify vector: gemini-3.5-flash (the API-key-tier default the recording captured), non-zero cost and tokens, agent=gemini-cli.

text: Session appears in ready shortly after gemini launch
Turn 1 ends; working → ready (final text-only message, zero tool calls)
Turn 3 prompt drives ready → working; this turn runs the run_shell_command `echo gamma` tool call (spec bullet: includes at least one tool call)

State stays continuously working across the tool-call cycle — the run_shell_command tool_use and its functionResponse result must NOT flicker the session to ready or waiting before the final reply (within-turn no-flicker, spec bullet 1)
Turn 3 ends; working → ready after the post-tool final text-only reply
Final turn ends; working → ready. Session reaches ready and stays there (spec bullets 3 & 4).
